description: Catalog of indexed knowledge sources from Notion and Google Drive, maintained by /kb:index for efficient retrieval by /kb:ask and /kb:find.

Source Title.description: Name of the source document or page

URL.description: Notion page URL or Google Drive file URL

Source Type.description: Platform where the source is stored

Classification.description: Content classification category based on 9-type taxonomy

Topic Keywords.description: Comma-separated topic keywords extracted from content

Word Count.description: Approximate word count of the source document

Last Edited.description: When the source was last modified in its original platform

Freshness.description: Freshness tier: Fresh (<30d), Current (30-90d), Aging (90-180d), Stale (>180d)

Parent Location.description: Parent page/folder path for organizational context

Status.description: Whether the source is active, archived, or had an indexing error

Indexed At.description: Timestamp when this source was last indexed

notes: Idempotent updates by URL — re-indexing the same source updates the existing record rather than creating duplicates. The /kb:index command is the only writer; /kb:ask and /kb:find read this database for search optimization. Freshness is recalculated on each index run based on Last Edited date.
